connect.title: IrohaConnect wallet
connect.description: Pair a wallet on this node, approve the session, and sign the Ministry agenda submission for the selected CID.
connect.unavailable: Connect is not enabled on this Torii endpoint.
connect.loadFailed: Unable to load Connect status for this Torii endpoint.

sessionStates.approved: Wallet approved. Drafting the Ministry submission.
sessionStates.signing: Waiting for the wallet signature and transaction result.
sessionStates.submitted: Submission confirmed and Ministry record loaded.
sessionStates.wallet_rejected: The wallet rejected the Connect session.
sessionStates.session_closed: The Connect session closed before submission finished.

proposal.title: CID denylist proposal
proposal.missingRootCid: This manifest did not decode to a public root CID, so a denylist draft cannot be generated.
proposal.removalRationalePlaceholder: Required reviewer note for the removal request
proposal.walletSubmissionHelp: The explorer keeps the JSON export fallback, but this button now drafts the Ministry agenda transaction, asks the approved wallet to sign it, submits it, and fetches the recorded proposal.
proposal.walletSubmissionComplete: The Ministry submission is recorded. You can still export the draft JSON for audit or offline review.
proposal.descriptionAdd: Generates an `AgendaProposalV1`-shaped draft for the selected root CID with an enumerated moderation reason.
proposal.descriptionRemove: Generates an `AgendaProposalV1`-shaped draft to remove the selected CID from the denylist, reusing the active moderation references when present.

payload.motivationAdd: {reason} review requested for manifest {manifestDigest} and its public SoraFS root CID {rootCid}.
payload.motivationRemove: Review requested to remove manifest {manifestDigest} and its public SoraFS root CID {rootCid} from the denylist.
payload.expectedImpactAdd: If accepted, this proposal would add the selected root CID to the denylist so delivery can be restricted while the evidence is reviewed.
payload.expectedImpactRemove: If accepted, this proposal would remove the selected root CID from the denylist so delivery can resume on participating gateways.
payload.targetReasonRemove: Request to remove SoraFS CID {rootCid} from the denylist and restore delivery.
payload.cidEvidenceDescriptionRemove: Manifest CAR evidence for removal review of {manifestDigest}.

notifications.transactionRejected: The transaction reached a terminal status of {status}.
notifications.transactionStatusTimeout: Timed out waiting for the transaction status.

issues.missingRootCid: Selected manifest is missing a decodable public root CID.

issues.invalidPgpFingerprint: PGP fingerprint must be 40 hexadecimal characters.
issues.invalidEvidenceDigest: Manifest payload digest must be 64 lowercase hexadecimal characters.

issues.invalidDuplicateReference: Duplicate proposal references must match AC-YYYY-###.

econometrics.title: Econometrics
econometrics.assetInvalid: Enter a valid asset definition ID or alias
econometrics.empty: Enter an asset definition id and click Compute.
econometrics.velocityNote: Velocity metrics are computed server-side when available; otherwise the UI scans Transfer instructions (subject to scan limits). Coverage is per-window; sampled means the scan limit was reached before the window start. Turnover/velocity uses circulating supply when Torii provides it (governance voting asset); otherwise it falls back to definition total supply, then scanned holder supply.
econometrics.issuanceNote: Issuance metrics are computed server-side when available; otherwise the UI scans Mint/Burn instructions (subject to scan limits). Coverage is per-window; sampled means the scan limit was reached before the window start. Net issuance depends on amount extraction from instruction payloads.
econometrics.churnEmpty: No previous snapshot available yet. Compute again later to estimate churn.
econometrics.churnNote: Churn is computed from local, browser-stored snapshots and reflects the holder list sample used for the snapshot.
econometrics.activityNote: Activity metrics are computed from a recent sample of Transfer instructions and may be incomplete if payloads omit amounts or object ids.

studio.title: Build Kotodama dApps
studio.subtitle: Snap together contract blocks, link them into a playful workflow, and preview the Torii deploy request in one studio.
studio.blueprintsHint: Start from a happy starter, then remix the blocks.
studio.metadataHint: Set the public deploy dataspace, signer, and any extra notes you want to keep with the document.

fields.title: Title
fields.directDeployPrivateKey: Private key for direct Torii deploy

studio.contractCanvasHint: Build the smart contract problem by stacking blocks together.
studio.workflowCanvasHint: Link contracts, explorer data, and outcomes like a simple flowchart.
studio.workflowAdvisoryHint: The workflow map documents operator intent and orchestration notes. Compile and deploy still come from the contract blocks on the left.
studio.noNodeSelected: Pick a workflow step to edit it.
studio.semanticHint: Fix these Studio issues before shipping the document.
studio.semanticReady: The live Studio checks are clear.
studio.linksHint: Add, label, and remove links without relying on canvas drag gestures.
studio.sourceHint: The block canvas writes Kotodama source for you in real time.
studio.compileIdle: Compile the current studio document to refresh hashes and the `/v1/contracts/deploy` request.
studio.compileBlocked: Fix the live Studio checks before compiling or deploying.
studio.compileReady: A compiled bundle is ready to sign and submit through Torii.
studio.compilePreview: Preview mode is active until a real compiler endpoint is configured.
studio.directDeployHint: Paste a private key here to submit the deploy request directly to Torii. This value is kept only in page memory and is not exported with the Studio document.
